subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant and Testament! Thy letter dated the twenty-second of Safar, 1337, hath reached me. All the peoples of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی عهد و پیمان نامه ایکه بتاریخ ۲۲ صفر ۱۳۳۷ بود رسید جمیع طوائف عالم در
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @universal peace; world unity, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @non-participation in politics
